name: Japantown Rooftop Temples
description: The GRAND OPENING of the Japantown Rooftop Temples is here ! The BRAND NEW Arasaka funded Rooftop Temples are a monument to all those who have fallen, protecting this Great City but also as a symbol of Arasakas Power and Wealth. High above the rest of Night Citys Japantown, even the dead now look down on the living peasants of Night City...
